programme.desc: Two families and a shocking betrayal are at the center of a murder mystery.

programme.title: The Mystery of Richard Simmons: A Diane Sawyer Special
programme.desc: The beloved fitness personality's remarkable rise to fame; examining the cultural impact that made him a household name.
When a young woman goes missing and another is found beaten in a nearby town, detectives learn that one of the victims holds the answers to both crimes in her hand.

programme.title: Live: Life, Liberty & Levin
programme.desc: Explore the fundamental values and principles undergirding American society, culture and politics; examine their relevance to the nation's future and everyday lives of the citizens.

programme.title: Live: Sunday Night in America With Trey Gowdy
programme.desc: Insightful analysis and a new outlook on the issues facing the country; Trey Gowdy, the former South Carolina Congressman, breaks down the legal and political news.

programme.title: Live: One Nation With Brian Kilmeade
programme.desc: In-depth analysis of the issues and stories that matter most to Americans while offering context and solutions to help bring the country together.

programme.title: Life, Liberty & Levin

programme.title: FOX News Sunday
programme.desc: Anchor Shannon Bream interviews the biggest newsmakers of the week and leads guests in providing context and analysis of the issues facing Americans.

programme.title: Live: FOX & Friends First
programme.desc: Hosts Todd Piro and Carley Shimkus present all the headlines viewers may have missed overnight, along with a preview of upcoming news events.

programme.title: Live: FOX and Friends
programme.desc: Co-hosts Steve Doocy, Ainsley Earhardt, Brian Kilmeade and Lawrence Jones highlight the latest.

programme.title: Live: America's Newsroom
programme.desc: Bill Hemmer and Dana Perino cover current events happening around the nation and the world; guests pertinent to the news topics are interviewed, and viewer emails are also answered by the anchors and guests.

programme.title: Live: America's Newsroom
programme.desc: Bill Hemmer and Dana Perino cover current events happening around the nation and the world; guests pertinent to the news topics are interviewed, and viewer emails are also answered by the anchors and guests.

programme.title: Live: The Faulkner Focus
programme.desc: Emmy-winning journalist Harris Faulkner provides the latest news with insightful analysis and interviews with top newsmakers.

programme.title: Live: Outnumbered
programme.desc: Four female panelists and one male colleague share their perspectives on the day's top news stories.

programme.title: Live: America Reports
programme.desc: A look at the latest news and headlines with Sandra Smith and John Roberts.

programme.title: Live: America Reports
programme.desc: A look at the latest news and headlines with Sandra Smith and John Roberts.

programme.title: Live: The Story With Martha MacCallum
programme.desc: Martha MacCallum brings the story of the times with her tough but fair interviews and straightforward analysis; "The Story" captures the voices that need to be heard and the people at the center of every history-shaping moment.

programme.title: Live: The Will Cain Show
programme.desc: Featuring Cain's signature podcast style and thoughtful perspective through conversations with newsmakers across politics, culture and sports.

programme.title: Live: The Five
programme.desc: Dana Perino, Greg Gutfeld and Jesse Watters and rotating liberal co-hosts Jessica Tarlov and Harold Ford Jr. discuss and debate the hot issues across the spectrum from politics to pop culture.

programme.title: Live: Special Report With Bret Baier
programme.desc: Former Fox News chief White House correspondent Bret Baier takes a closer look at political stories from Washington, DC.

programme.title: Live: The Ingraham Angle
programme.desc: Laura Ingraham aims to cut through the Washington chatter to speak directly with unexpected voices and the actual people who are impacted by the news of the day.

programme.title: Live: Jesse Watters Primetime
programme.desc: Jesse Watters speaks with newsmakers from across the U.S. to present news with a clear and direct approach.

programme.title: Live: Hannity
programme.desc: Sean Hannity interviews political figures and newsmakers and offers his own conservative perspective on events.

programme.title: Gutfeld!
programme.desc: Greg Gutfeld looks at the news of the day through a satiric lens fused with pop culture and features his takes on the day's headlines.

programme.title: Live: Fox News at Night
programme.desc: Hard news and analysis of compelling stories from DC and across the country; journalists provide viewers with must-see information and consequential news.

programme.desc: Dana Perino, Greg Gutfeld and Jesse Watters and rotating liberal co-hosts Jessica Tarlov and Harold Ford Jr. discuss and debate the hot issues across the spectrum from politics to pop culture.

programme.title: Live: The Will Cain Show
programme.desc: Featuring Cain's signature podcast style and thoughtful perspective through conversations with newsmakers across politics, culture and sports.

programme.title: Live: The Five
programme.desc: Dana Perino, Greg Gutfeld and Jesse Watters and rotating liberal co-hosts Jessica Tarlov and Harold Ford Jr. discuss and debate the hot issues across the spectrum from politics to pop culture.

programme.title: Live: Special Report With Bret Baier
programme.desc: Former Fox News chief White House correspondent Bret Baier takes a closer look at political stories from Washington, DC.

programme.title: Live: The Ingraham Angle
programme.desc: Laura Ingraham aims to cut through the Washington chatter to speak directly with unexpected voices and the actual people who are impacted by the news of the day.

programme.title: Live: Jesse Watters Primetime
programme.desc: Jesse Watters speaks with newsmakers from across the U.S. to present news with a clear and direct approach.

programme.title: Vietnam: Footsteps of My Father With Harris Faulkner
programme.desc: Vietnam is a nation both ancient and modern, bursting with life and rooted in history; it is Vietnam where American soldiers fought more than 50 years ago and where Harris Faulkner's father, Lt. Col. Bobby Harris, served two tours of duty.

programme.title: To Rescue the American Spirit
programme.desc: Bret Baier reveals the storied life of Theodore Roosevelt, a leader whose passion, daring, and prowess left an indelible mark on the fabric of our country.

programme.title: 43 Portraits: George W. Bush
programme.desc: Dana Perino sits down with former President George W. Bush in Dallas to talk about his new book, "Out of Many, One: Portraits of America's Immigrants.".

programme.title: General Patton and the Prayer That Changed History
programme.desc: Hosted by Tim Kennedy; his troops battered, freezing and close to defeat by the German military, General George Patton calls on his faith to help turn the tide of the war just in the nick of time.

programme.title: American Built
programme.desc: One man's larger-than-life idea; how an army of carvers managed to "face" the nation.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Author and evangelist Joel Osteen spreads his message of love and hope as he preaches at the 30,000-plus member Lakewood Church in Houston. The program can be seen in more than 100 countries. Osteen urges people to live at their full potential and form a close relationship with God.

programme.title: Joni Table Talk
programme.desc: Joni and guests tackle a wide range of relevant issues, controversial subjects and hard-hitting news topics with candor and wit.

programme.title: Allen Jackson
programme.desc: Pastor Allen Jackson encourages you to stand firm in the midst of shaking by focusing on the immovable Word of God and become devoted followers of Jesus Christ.

programme.title: CSN Mint - America 250 Coin Roll Collection!
programme.desc: CSN Mint presents 1776-2026 U.S. Mint coin roll offers honoring America's 250th Anniversary, including the Emerging Liberty Dime, Enduring Liberty Half Dollar, and P&D Quarter Roll Continuity.

programme.title: 1776 Silver Rarities
programme.desc: Collect every circulation dual date 1776-2026 denomination struck; each coin in this 10-Coin Silver Set is certified PF70UCAM in coveted First Day of Issue holders; included are some one-year only designs and strikes celebrating America's 250th.

programme.title: 1776 Silver Rarities
programme.desc: Collect every circulation dual date 1776-2026 denomination struck; each coin in this 10-Coin Silver Set is certified PF70UCAM in coveted First Day of Issue holders; included are some one-year only designs and strikes celebrating America's 250th.

programme.title: The Aging Brain
programme.desc: Learn what's behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQ's Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

programme.title: Freedom to Leave the House! Inogen Portable Oxygen
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: Live: FOX Weather First
programme.desc: Waking up at 5am to the first national forecast of the day; all the latest weather news and everything one needs to prepare for the day ahead.

programme.title: Live: Mornings With Maria Bartiromo
programme.desc: Maria Bartiromo brings her knowledge of the finance industry to discuss news stories from around the world with a panel of rotating industry experts.

programme.title: Live: Varney & Company

programme.title: Live: The Big Money Show
programme.desc: Taylor Riggs, Brian Brenberg and Jackie DeAngelis host an informative and fast-paced hour filled with business topics that impact everyone from Wall Street to the average person.

programme.title: Live: The Big Money Show
programme.desc: Taylor Riggs, Brian Brenberg and Jackie DeAngelis host an informative and fast-paced hour filled with business topics that impact everyone from Wall Street to the average person.

programme.title: Live: Making Money With Charles Payne
programme.desc: Wall Street analyst Charles Payne discusses investment prospects.

programme.title: Live: The Claman Countdown
programme.desc: Capturing the chaos of the last hour on Wall Street.

programme.title: Live: Kudlow
programme.desc: Host Larry Kudlow leads roundtable discussions on the policies impacting the domestic and global economies and interviews with business influencers across the world.

programme.title: Live: The Evening Edit
programme.desc: Breaking down the news of the day after the markets close.

programme.title: Live: The Bottom Line
programme.desc: Taking on the debated issues in the business and political world, plus the kitchen table topics that matter to Americans.

programme.title: Kudlow
programme.desc: Host Larry Kudlow leads roundtable discussions on the policies impacting the domestic and global economies and interviews with business influencers across the world.

programme.title: Legends & Lies: The Patriots
programme.desc: The new nation faces the burden of financial debt after winning the revolution; the Founding Fathers take on the challenge of creating a political structure to secure the freedoms and rights of American citizens.

programme.title: Legends & Lies: The Patriots
programme.desc: Sitting Vice President to Thomas Jefferson, Aaron Burr kills long time political rival, Alexander Hamilton in a duel over accusations of corruption; Burr faces murder charges and attempts to annex Florida and Texas before leaving office.

programme.title: Legends & Lies: The Patriots
programme.desc: From the first shots of the Boston Massacre to the surrender at Yorktown, Va., African American men and women play a crucial role in winning America's fight for independence.

programme.title: Legends & Lies: The Patriots
programme.desc: Highlighting the struggle and personal sacrifice of Patriot heroes and taking a chronological march through the American Revolution; what begins as a battle for the rights of British citizens turns into a violent class war.

programme.title: Legends & Lies: The Patriots
programme.desc: The story behind the Sons of Liberty and how they started the fight for American independence leading to the infamous Boston Massacre.

programme.title: CSN Mint: 2026 U.S. Silver Proof Set PF70
programme.desc: Celebrate America's 250th with the 2026 U.S. Mint Silver Proof Set, certified perfect NGC PF70 with the official America 250 logo. Includes 10 proof coins, one-year-only designs, fine silver issues and CSN exclusive numbering.

programme.title: CSN Mint - America 250 Silver Eagles
programme.desc: Join CSN Mint for two patriotic 1776-2026 Silver Eagle overstrikes featuring the American Flag Privy and Constitution Privy. Designed by Daniel Carr, struck using a retired Denver Mint press, and certified perfect MS70.

programme.title: 2026 Silver Eagle is here & it is a once-in-a-lifetime coin!
programme.desc: Join your hosts Kevin Cash & Cory Cady as we discuss the 250th Anniversary of America with the official "America 250" logo on a Silver American Eagle label; we are locking in orders for this iconic release, but coins are limited! Don't miss out!

programme.title: 2026 Proof Silver Eagle: America's 250th Anniversary Release
programme.desc: Join Mike Mezack for a historic release, the first-ever 1776-2026 dual-date Proof Silver Eagle with Liberty Bell privy mark, struck in .999 silver for America's 250th Anniversary; a one-year-only issue collectors won't want to miss.

programme.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: CSN Mint - America 250 Coin Roll Collection!
programme.desc: CSN Mint presents 1776-2026 U.S. Mint coin roll offers honoring America's 250th Anniversary, including the Emerging Liberty Dime, Enduring Liberty Half Dollar, and P&D Quarter Roll Continuity.

programme.desc: The new nation faces the burden of financial debt after winning the revolution; the Founding Fathers take on the challenge of creating a political structure to secure the freedoms and rights of American citizens.

programme.title: Kelsey Grammer's Historic Battles for America
programme.desc: America's push west forces conflicts with Native tribes; driven by ego, George Custer launches a doomed assault against a large band of Indigenous warriors, now enshrined as "Custer's Last Stand.".

programme.title: 60 Minutes
programme.desc: The oldest and most-watched newsmagazine on television gets the real story on America's most prevalent issues. CBS News correspondents contribute segments to each hourlong episode. Topics range from hard news coverage to politics, lifestyle, pop culture, business, health, and science. The correspondents and contributors include Sharyn Alfonsi, Anderson Cooper, Steve Kroft, Lara Logan, Norah O'Donn

programme.title: 60 Minutes
programme.desc: The oldest and most-watched newsmagazine on television gets the real story on America's most prevalent issues. CBS News correspondents contribute segments to each hourlong episode. Topics range from hard news coverage to politics, lifestyle, pop culture, business, health, and science. The correspondents and contributors include Sharyn Alfonsi, Anderson Cooper, Steve Kroft, Lara Logan, Norah O'Donn

programme.title: CBS Weekend News
programme.desc: Journalist Adriana Diaz anchors the Saturday edition of the CBS news program from Chicago, while Jericka Duncan takes the helm of the Sunday broadcast from New York. The two are the latest to fill the roll of weekend anchor, which was most recently represented by Reena Ninan and Eliane Quijano. The program offers the latest headlines, original reporting and in-depth pieces that add context and per

programme.title: CBS Weekend News
programme.desc: Journalist Adriana Diaz anchors the Saturday edition of the CBS news program from Chicago, while Jericka Duncan takes the helm of the Sunday broadcast from New York. The two are the latest to fill the roll of weekend anchor, which was most recently represented by Reena Ninan and Eliane Quijano. The program offers the latest headlines, original reporting and in-depth pieces that add context and per

programme.title: 60 Minutes
programme.desc: The oldest and most-watched newsmagazine on television gets the real story on America's most prevalent issues. CBS News correspondents contribute segments to each hourlong episode. Topics range from hard news coverage to politics, lifestyle, pop culture, business, health, and science. The correspondents and contributors include Sharyn Alfonsi, Anderson Cooper, Steve Kroft, Lara Logan, Norah O'Donn

programme.title: Face the Nation
programme.desc: "Face the Nation," which is one of the longest-running news programs on the air, offers insight and analysis on the top issues of the day. Moderator Margaret Brennan welcomes politicians, government leaders and international newsmakers to a roundtable discussion of current events with CBS News correspondents.

programme.title: CBS News Roundup
programme.desc: The headlines one needs to know overnight... plus, a roundup of MoneyWatch, health, consumer and up-to-the-minute technology news, the latest weather, and inspiring stories of kindness and hope.

programme.title: CBS News Roundup
programme.desc: The headlines one needs to know overnight... plus, a roundup of MoneyWatch, health, consumer and up-to-the-minute technology news, the latest weather, and inspiring stories of kindness and hope.

programme.title: CBS News Mornings
programme.desc: CBS News Mornings broadcasts on weekdays and offers viewers up-to-date news, comprehensive weather forecasts, and highlights from the world of sports.

programme.title: CBS News Mornings
programme.desc: CBS News Mornings broadcasts on weekdays and offers viewers up-to-date news, comprehensive weather forecasts, and highlights from the world of sports.

programme.title: CBS News Mornings

programme.title: CBS News Mornings
programme.desc: CBS News Mornings broadcasts on weekdays and offers viewers up-to-date news, comprehensive weather forecasts, and highlights from the world of sports.

programme.title: CBS Morning News
programme.desc: CBS News Mornings is a live daily morning news show that is anchored by Anne-Marie Green. Get ahead on the latest news by streaming the most important national and global stories first thing in the morning.

programme.title: CBS Mornings
programme.desc: Hosts Gayle King, Tony Dokoupil and Nate Burleson set out to unite CBS' morning landscape with their lively and original reporting on international news stories during the weekday program's first hour, while expanding on feature reporting during the second hour with live interviews as well as in-depth pieces, covering topics from news, sports, climate and technology to race, health, parenting and

programme.title: CBS News 24/7
programme.desc: Coverage, reporting and storytelling from CBS News and Stations; a look at how news coverage comes together.

programme.title: CBS News 24/7

programme.title: The Takeout with Major Garrett
programme.desc: The Takeout is a new spin on the widely acclaimed podcast hosted by CBS News Chief Washington Correspondent Major Garrett. A daily streaming show that harnesses the best of CBS News's political reporting and lives comfortably in deep discussions of economics, pop culture, sports and technology.

programme.title: The Daily Report
programme.desc: The Daily Report on CBS News features original interviews and insights on the most important, urgent and interesting stories of the day.

programme.title: 24/7 Primetime
programme.desc: Delivering the news you need to know.

programme.title: The Daily Report
programme.desc: The Daily Report on CBS News features original interviews and insights on the most important, urgent and interesting stories of the day.

programme.title: CBS Evening News
programme.desc: The CBS Evening News team shares the day's stories, delivering context and depth to bring greater understanding to the world.

programme.title: 24/7 Primetime

programme.title: Pure Outdoor
programme.desc: Outdoor sports from all over the world, from freestyle ski jumping to airplane aerobatics.

programme.title: Road Trip Angler
programme.desc: Jameson Redding hits the road to find the best fishing spots in America.

programme.title: Invincible
programme.desc: Periods of unrivaled domination in sport, including chapters from sport's greatest careers and iconic dynasties.

programme.title: The Short List
programme.desc: The sports countdown, featuring iconic themes focused upon the memorable moments and individuals in sports; the 10 memorable debuts, the 10 revered innovators, the comebacks of all time and much more.

programme.title: Greatest Sports Legends: Then and Now
programme.desc: Hosts Gregg Murphy and Wes Hall compare sports legends of the past to those of today.

programme.title: The Iconic
programme.desc: A collection of the stories behind some of the most iconic moments in the world of sports, as well as unforgettable, events, teams and players.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: From Commerce Casino in Commerce, Calif.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: High-stakes tournament poker from some of the world's famous casinos and card rooms.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: Professional poker action from a series of international tournaments.

programme.title: She's in the Game
programme.desc: Meet the next generation of superstar female athletes around the country as we go behind the scenes to shine the light on them and their interests off the field, along with catching up with the female legends who paved the way for all this growth.

programme.title: On Her Mark
programme.desc: Join host Hannah Donnelly as she sits down with female athletes, fitness professionals and women in sports.

programme.title: Live: Boston Sports Tonight With Felger and Holley
programme.desc: Michael Felger and Michael Holley meet fans at the cross-section of opinion, information and fun. The unique format provides immediate, real-time reactions to what's happening throughout the Boston sports world.
